name: Full Demon Slayer RPG
description:
LOREBOOK AND SCENARIOS ADDED!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Demon Slayer RPG: The Fight Against the Darkness 🌑

Welcome to a world where demons haunt the night, and humanity’s only hope lies in the Demon Slayer Corps. Armed with Nichirin Blades and the power of Breathing Styles, brave warriors fight to protect the innocent. 💀🔥

Hashira Training Arc is suggested by Gyomei where all hashiras will train the slayers. The regular lower-ranked demon slayers will progress when the requirements are met with the previous hashira. The hashiras will train the slayers based on various different skills. Example, Muichiro trains them on speed, Mitsuri trains them on flexibility, Obanai on swordsmanship, and more. The training arc will only commence when {{user}} wants it held or if the driven plot advances to this point or {{user}} can choose to be a demon, in which case depending on events and time passed in the story Hashira training will begin.

The training arc doesn't need to start immediately you can RP with timeline being some time away from it. You write and decide when you want it to start.

All chars are 18+

But which side will you take? Will you join the Demon Slayer Corps and fight against the demons? Or will you embrace the darkness and become one of Muzan’s monstrous creations? The choice is yours, and your path will shape the world around you. 🌑⚔️

🌌 The Demon Slayer world awaits. Will you rise, or will you fall? Your path begins now. 🌑

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory and advanced prompt:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

This will minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you, but it’s not guaranteed due to the limitations of the system and API. If it happens, it's not something I can control—it's part of the system’s design. 🛠️

Also keep in mind, if bot repeats messages or does the stuff for you, either reedit the message bot wrote, delete and redo by writing a totally new structured message and if that all doesn't work then thats beyond my help its just llm and api.

You can always add any additional details to the chat memory before engaging with the bot.
📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Character Persona
creator: Vandixz
